day1_night_start.name: Me
day1_night_start.text: *I'm home. I cook some instant noodles and think back on the day.*

day1_night_phone_2.name: Me
day1_night_phone_2.text: *The group chat from my old school. The message I sent this morning -- 'I transferred, take care everyone~'*

day1_night_phone_4.name: Me
day1_night_phone_4.text: *I also sent a personal message to my close friend Minsu. 'Hey Minsu, I transferred! This school is huge' -- still no reply.*

day1_night_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day1_night_sea_2.text: What do you want in your lunchbox tomorrow?

day1_night_sea_4.name: Me
day1_night_sea_4.text: *...Asking about tomorrow's lunchbox menu on the first day.*

day1_night_sea_reply_1.name: Han Sea
day1_night_sea_reply_1.text: Ooh nice! Look forward to it tomorrow <3

day1_night_sea_reply_2.name: Han Sea
day1_night_sea_reply_2.text: Lol okay~ don't be surprised tomorrow!

day1_night_sleep_1.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_1.text: *I lie in bed and stare at the ceiling.*

day1_night_sleep_2.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_2.text: *...I think I can get used to this. This school.*

day1_night_sleep_4.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_4.text: *...Just before falling asleep, a strange sensation washed over me. That stain on the ceiling -- it looks like a familiar shape.*

day1_night_sleep_5.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_5.text: *...All apartment ceilings probably look the same. I closed my eyes.*
